overview: The Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur), established in 1959, is one of India's most prestigious engineering institutions. Renowned for its academic excellence and innovation in science and technology, IIT Kanpur continues to be a top choice for students nationwide.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance; NAAC 'A++' grade accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹1,00,000 per semester for General/OBC students with income > ₹5 lakh. Income-based and caste-based waivers apply.
₹5,000 per semester for General/OBC (non-sponsored). Sponsored candidates pay ₹25,000 per semester. SC/ST/PwD exempt.

placements.companiesVisited: Jane Street, Microsoft, Google, Texas Instruments, Qualcomm, Deutsche Bank, Goldman Sachs, Rakuten Mobile

keyTrends.higherStudies: ~25% (283 students) of BTech batch opted for higher studies over placement
keyTrends.mtechManagement: MTech in Dept. of Management Sciences achieved 100% placement in 2024, focusing on AI & Data Science roles

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national entrance exams followed by JoSAA/COAP/department-level counseling for seat allocation.
admissions.importantDates: Aligned with JoSAA/COAP schedules and IIT Kanpur's academic calendar.

campus.specialNote: Hostel and Mess charges range from ₹30,000–₹35,000 per semester. A one-time admission fee of ₹2,950 is applicable. Waivers and scholarships available based on income and category.

contact.address: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, Kalyanpur, Kanpur - 208016, Uttar Pradesh, India
